command:
echo "=== CHECK LOCAL FILESYSTEM ==="
ls -lah /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/

echo ""
echo "=== CHECK GITEA AUDIT FOLDER ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token 044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6" \
  "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/audit/compliance" | \
  python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(d,list):
    print(f'Gitea audit/compliance files: {len(d)}')
    for f in d: print(f'  {f.get(\"name\")}')
else:
    print('Response:', str(d)[:200])
"

echo ""
echo "=== SEND TEST REQUEST ==="
curl -s -X POST "http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-DBG","baseline":"b","rollbackPlan":"r","evidence":"e"}' \
  -o /tmp/dbg.json
python3 -c "
import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/dbg.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
# Print ALL keys to see what's in the response
for k,v in d.items():
    if 'audit' in k.lower() or 'error' in k.lower():
        print(f'  {k}: {str(v)[:100]}')
print('  ALL KEYS:', list(d.keys()))
"

echo ""
echo "=== WAIT AND RECHECK FILESYSTEM ==="
sleep 3
ls -lah /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/

echo ""
echo "=== RECHECK GITEA ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token 044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6" \
  "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/audit/compliance" | \
  python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(d,list):
    print(f'Gitea files after test: {len(d)}')
    for f in d: print(f'  {f.get(\"name\")}')
else:
    print('Response:', str(d)[:200])
"
